description: Expose codeagent-wrapper on PATH via npm bin field.
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(cli): add `codeagent-wrapper` to package `bin` so `npm install -g` puts it on PATH.
- fix(cli): realpath-aware main-guard so npm global symlinks still invoke `main()`.
- docs: workflow/templates/READMEs teach bare `codeagent-wrapper` invocation instead of the sibling `readlink` formula.
notes:
No `--migrate` required.

After upgrade, `command -v codeagent-wrapper` should resolve. Agents can call:

```bash
echo "<prompt>" | codeagent-wrapper --backend <agy|codex|claude|grok|kimi> [--model <m>] - "$PWD"
```

Override remains: `TRELLIS_CODEAGENT_WRAPPER`.

Install: `npm install -g @decade666/trellis@latest`
